name: glazed-ceramic__brushed-anodized__0001

inputs.surfaceDetail: Fine grain, realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches 유연한 파도 곡선, 아름다운 투각
inputs.lighting: Top-left key light + soft 3-point studio lighting, minimize shadows

promptKo:
목표: 공중에 단 하나의 구(스피어)만 중앙에 떠 있는 재질 샘플 이미지.
재질(Material): Glazed Ceramic
색(Color): Low-saturation anodized silver tone
마감(Finish): Brushed + Anodized
표면 디테일(Texture/Detail): Fine grain, realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches 유연한 파도 곡선, 아름다운 투각 
조명(Lighting): Top-left key light + soft 3-point studio lighting, minimize shadows
환경: 순백(#FFFFFF) 배경, 바닥/접촉 그림자 없음, 다른 오브젝트 없음.
금지: 텍스트/로고/라벨/워터마크/설명 문구.
promptEn: A single sphere floating centrally in midair, material glazed ceramic, low-saturation anodized silver tone color, brushed and anodized finish, fine grain texture with realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches, smooth wavy curves with beautiful cutouts. Lighting with top-left key light and soft 3-point studio lighting to minimize shadows. Pure white (#FFFFFF) background, no floor or contact shadows, no other objects. No text, logos, labels, watermarks, or descriptive text.
promptCmf: A photorealistic 3D sphere isolated on a pure white background. The sphere features glazed ceramic material with a low-saturation anodized silver tone color and a brushed anodized finish. Surface detail: fine grain texture with smooth wavy curves and beautiful cutouts, realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches. Lighting: top-left key light with soft 3-point studio lighting to minimize shadows. No floor/contact shadows; the sphere appears floating in a void. Centered composition, clean neutral studio look, realistic PBR material response, crisp but soft edge highlights, no depth-of-field gimmicks. No text, no logos, no labels, no watermark, no extra objects, exactly one sphere.
